steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Wait for splash screen.
3. Complete onboarding (ON_01B to ON_01E).
4. Tap Get Started!.
5. Connect printer.
6. Select image from gallery.
7. Open Print Preview screen.
8. Observe top header.
 9.Observe toast notification upon entry.
cases.expected:
Back arrow, Printer name/status and Share icon are visible and clickable.
Toast appears regarding double tap to reset Fit/Fill and fades after 5 seconds.

verifications.expected:
Back arrow, Printer name/status and Share icon are visible and clickable.
Toast appears regarding double tap to reset Fit/Fill and fades after 5 seconds.
verifications.verification: Verify toast: Printer

steps: 1. Launch the application.
2. Wait for splash screen completion.
3. Swipe to continue and complete onboarding steps (ON_01B → ON_01D).
4. Reach ON_01E onboarding screen.
5. Locate and verify the Get Started! button.
6. Tap the Get Started! button.
7. Navigate to Print Preview screen in a fresh session.
8. Observe the screen without any interaction.
cases.expected: The edit tip banner with text "Tap here to edit photo." appears automatically and points to the Edit button.

verifications.expected: The edit tip banner with text "Tap here to edit photo." appears automatically and points to the Edit button.
verifications.verification: Verify visible: Tap here to edit photo.

5. Exit Print Preview screen.
6. Re-enter Print Preview screen within the same session.

cases.description: Priority Handling with System Toast Messages
steps: 1. Launch the application.
2. Complete onboarding steps (ON_01B → ON_01D).
3. Reach ON_01E and tap Get Started!.
4. Navigate to Print Preview screen where both system toast and edit tip are triggered simultaneously.
5. Observe UI behavior when both messages are active.
cases.expected: System toast message is displayed first with highest priority. The edit tip remains hidden until the toast disappears, then appears automatically.

verifications.description: Priority Handling with System Toast Messages
verifications.expected: System toast message is displayed first with highest priority. The edit tip remains hidden until the toast disappears, then appears automatically.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

cases.description: Verification of Landscape Photo Automatic 90-Degree Rotation and SDK Preservation
steps: 1. Launch the application.
2. Select and load a landscape orientation photo into the Print Preview screen.
3. Observe the image placement on the canvas.
4. Open the image in AI tools or launch the Custom SDK editor.
cases.expected: The landscape image automatically rotates 90 degrees clockwise to fit the vertical canvas layout. The rotated orientation is preserved when opened in AI tools or the Custom SDK workspace without any layout distortion or reset.

verifications.description: Verification of Landscape Photo Automatic 90-Degree Rotation and SDK Preservation
verifications.expected: The landscape image automatically rotates 90 degrees clockwise to fit the vertical canvas layout. The rotated orientation is preserved when opened in AI tools or the Custom SDK workspace without any layout distortion or reset.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

cases.description: Verify automatic rotation of landscape image
steps: 1. Launch application and wait for splash screen to complete.
2. Complete onboarding (ON_01B–ON_01E).
3. Tap Get Started → Sign Up Later.
4. Navigate to Create → AI Tools (CR_16A).
5. Select Ready-to-Generate tool (e.g., Remove Background).
6. Select landscape image from Gallery (CR_16A.1_Select Image from Gallery).
7. CR_16A.5_Landscape Photo Fit screen opens.
8. Verify top left Back Arrow icon.
9. Verify selected tool name is displayed in header.
10. Verify image is rotated automatically by 90° clockwise.
11. Verify image fits correctly in vertical canvas without cropping or distortion.
12. Verify Generate button is displayed at the bottom.
13. Tap Generate.
cases.expected: Image rotates automatically by 90° clockwise and AI processing starts successfully.

verifications.description: Verify automatic rotation of landscape image
verifications.expected: Image rotates automatically by 90° clockwise and AI processing starts successfully.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

steps: 1. Launch the application and complete onboarding flow.
2. Tap Get Start!.
3. Tap Sign up later.
4. Navigate to Dashboard Home screen.
5. Select an image from Gallery or Facebook.
6. Tap the selected image and verify Print Preview screen opens.
7. Tap the Edit icon.
8. Verify Edit screen opens with Back Arrow on left and Done button on right.
9. Verify edit options are displayed at the bottom. (Auto, Adjust, Filters, Frames, Stickers, Text, Brush, Add Photo, Transform)
10. Apply any edit option.
11. Verify Cancel button on left, Restore Photo text at center and Apply button on right are displayed.
12. Tap Apply.
13. Verify edit is applied to the image.
14. Tap Done.
15. Verify user is redirected to Print Preview screen.
cases.expected: Edit is applied successfully and user is redirected to Print Preview screen.

verifications.expected: Edit is applied successfully and user is redirected to Print Preview screen.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

steps: 1. Launch the application and complete onboarding flow.
2. Tap Get Start!.
3. Tap Sign up later.
4. Navigate to Dashboard Home screen.
5. Select an image from Gallery or Facebook.
6. Tap the selected image and verify Print Preview screen opens.
7. Tap the Edit icon.
8. Verify Edit screen opens with Back Arrow on left and Done button on right.

10. Apply any edit option.(Auto, Adjust, Filters, Frames, Stickers, Text, Brush, Add Photo, Transform)

12. Tap Cancel.
13. Verify changes are discarded.
14. Tap Done.
15. Verify user is redirected to Print Preview screen without applying edits.

steps: 1. Launch the application and complete onboarding flow.
2. Tap Get Start!.
3. Tap Sign up later.

cases.description: Verify edit functionality and discard changes
steps: 1. Launch the application and complete onboarding flow.
2. Tap Get Start!.
3. Tap Sign up later.
4. Navigate to Dashboard Home screen.
5. Select a video from Gallery.
6. Verify user is redirected to Video Print Preview screen.
7. Tap the Edit icon.
8. Verify Edit screen opens.
9. Verify editing options are displayed: Auto, Adjust, Filters, Frames, Stickers, Text, Brush, Add Photo, Transform.
10. Apply any edit option and tap Apply.
11. Tap Done and verify user returns to Print Preview screen.
12. Tap the Back Arrow icon.
13. Verify "Save as new photo?" popup appears with Save to Gallery, Do not save, and Close (X) options.
14. Tap Do not save.
15. Verify popup closes and edited image is not saved to Gallery.
cases.expected: Changes are discarded successfully. Popup closes and edited image is not saved to Gallery. Application remains stable without crash.

verifications.description: Verify edit functionality and discard changes
verifications.expected: Changes are discarded successfully. Popup closes and edited image is not saved to Gallery. Application remains stable without crash.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen
